items.title: Aventon spring sale drops the Level 3 and Pace 4 smart e-bikes to their lowest prices starting from $1,599
items.summary:
Aventon has launched a spring sale that is giving price cuts to a selection of smart e-bikes that puts them at their best prices to date, like the Level 3 Step-Over Smart Commuter e-bike down at $1,699 shipped, as well as its step-through counterpart that is also down at $1,699 shipped. These new models have only been included in two previous sale – both during Black Friday and Christmas events, where they were cut down from their $1,899 full prices to $1,699. Now, during the brand’s first 2026 savings event, you’re getting another opportunity at a $200 markdown to the all-time lowest price we have tracked. The other included model in this sale is the Pace 4 Smart Cruiser e-bike at its $1,599 low, and we’ve also listed the other e-bikes for your perusal below.

items.title: What founders can learn from Anjuna’s layoffs and recovery
items.summary: In 2021, Anjuna Security was growing fast, hiring aggressively, and chasing a market that seemed limitless. By the end of that year, the venture-backed cybersecurity company had scaled to around 75 employees, building out sales, customer success, and support teams in anticipation of continued hypergrowth. Then 2022 hit.

items.title: Bluetti’s Earth Day Sale takes up to 53% off power stations + three exclusive bonus savings codes – all starting from $379
items.summary:
Bluetti has launched its Earth Day power station sale with up to 53% discounts and a few of our exclusive bonus savings codes for even better prices – plus, some models are getting FREE gifts too. One of my top picks from this event is Bluetti’s latest Elite 300 Portable Power Station down at $1,103.08 shipped, after using our exclusive code 9TO5TOYS8OFF at checkout. This is the brand’s newest power solution that launched at the top of March, starting from its $2,299 MSRP at $1,099, which we saw fall further to $1,011 with our exclusive code. Now, it’s starting in this sale $100 higher in price, with the code still giving you a solid $1,195 combined markdown for the next-best price we have tracked. Head below to get a breakdown of our various exclusive codes during this event, a rundown on the power station itself, and to browse the full lineup of deals while they last.

items.title: Sierra’s Bret Taylor says the era of clicking buttons is over
